name: Tool Search / Deferred Loading (Sonnet 4.6, Wave 2)
description: Forces CC's tool-search path by asking about a specific tool capability. Verifies presence of tool_search_tool_bm25_20251119 or tool_search_tool_regex_20251119 in the tools array when defer_loading is enabled. Distinct from the preexisting tool-search.json which tests tool registration metadata at the manifest level.
prompt: Do you have a tool that can search the web? If yes, just say its name.
expectedBehavior: If CC v2.1.112 sends defer_loading: true, tools[] includes a server-side tool of type tool_search_tool_bm25_20251119 or tool_search_tool_regex_20251119. Response may include a tool_use block calling the search tool.
